chunks.text: NetApp Fileserver Maintenance, Friday November 28, 2025 | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar NetApp Fileserver Maintenance, Friday November 28, 2025 We are scheduling a NetApp ONTAP upgrade, to apply a necess

heduling a NetApp ONTAP upgrade, to apply a necessary update to our NetApp fileservers, from 8am to 12pm on Friday, November 28, 2025 . All Home directories and Project shares (CIFS/SMB and NFS) may experience disconnection during the update that may

xperience disconnection during the update that may cause data loss on active, open files. Please close your open files and save them before Friday morning. Services (e.g. webservice) that depend on this storage will also be temporarily down or unres

his storage will also be temporarily down or unresponsive. When maintenance is completed, NFS clients should automatically resume normal operation, but a reboot should help if they don’t. CIFS clients (such as Windows and MacOS) may need to remount f

(such as Windows and MacOS) may need to remount filesystems, or simply be rebooted. UPDATE [2025-11-28 | larsrohr ] This work was completed by about 11am. Resolved as of 2025-11-28 11am Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents,
ar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
